description: Strategies for fitting hearing aids, including selection and recommendation, use of prescription gain formulas, and verification of gain. Considerations in geriatric and pediatric hearing aid fitting and ethical issues. Basic techniques in determining patient satisfaction with hearing aids.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Audiology Consortial Program with UW-Stevens Point AUD
